title: Ventas Healthcare Property
description: Schema for a Ventas portfolio property, including senior housing communities, medical office buildings, life science facilities, and health systems.

propertyId.description: Unique property identifier in the Ventas portfolio

leaseType.description: Lease or operating structure for the property

operator.description: Name of the property operator or management company

unitCount.description: Number of residential units or beds

squareFootage.description: Gross leasable area in square feet

occupancyRate.description: Current occupancy rate as a decimal (0.0-1.0)

yearBuilt.description: Year the property was built or opened

capRate.description: Capitalization rate at acquisition or current valuation
